rationale: The Executor is blocked on a missing external credential: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is absent from .env.test and has no entry in the 1Password 'shared-eng' vault (where Braintree equivalents live). Unit tests with mocked signatures pass; the only gap is full integration testing, which requires the actual test-mode webhook secret from Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks. No directive or plan amendment can provision a credential that was never created — this requires a human with Stripe Dashboard access and 1Password vault write permissions.
